signals.headline: Israel-Lebanon Talks Initiated | CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Israel-Lebanon Talks Initiated | CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**
Secretary of State Marco Rubio is hosting the first talks between Israel and Lebanon.[1] Meanwhile, Israel continues intensive military operations against Hezbollah in southern Lebanon despite ongoing diplomacy.[4]

signals.headline: Confidence: HIGH**

Confidence: HIGH**

Vice President JD Vance announced on April 13 that the United States has made "a lot of progress" in peace negotiations with Iran[1]. Talks in Pakistan ended without a deal after 21 hours, with the U.S. delegation departing because Iran's side could not finalize an agreement without approval from Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei[1].

signals.headline: Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders | YES | HIGH confidence**

Solana's network reached an unprecedented milestone with **167 million monthly token holders** and daily non-vote transactions hitting historic highs of **148 million transactions**[1]. This represents a 12% year-on-year increase and confirms sustained network adoption despite recent market volatility[6].

signals.headline: Solana's Q1 2026 Economic Activity Surges to $1
signals.raw:
Solana's Q1 2026 Economic Activity Surges to $1.1 Trillion | YES | HIGH confidence**

On-chain economic activity reached **$1.1 trillion in Q1 2026**, marking a **6,558.6% increase** from the previous quarter[3]. This represents a massive rebound in transaction throughput, DeFi participation, and staking, validating the network's scalability claims and signaling robust fundamental growth beyond sp

signals.headline: Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade Targets 150ms Transaction Finality | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade Targets 150ms Transaction Finality | YES | HIGH confidence**

The highly anticipated **Alpenglow upgrade aims to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to 150 milliseconds**[1], a critical performance improvement expected to enhance network competitiveness.

signals.headline: SOL Price Tests $87 Resistance with $108 Target | YES | MEDIUM confidence**
signals.raw:
SOL Price Tests $87 Resistance with $108 Target | YES | MEDIUM confidence**

Analysts confirm SOL is **testing resistance near $87, with $108 as the next major target if momentum holds**[3]. However, this contrasts with bearish pressure from the $285 million Drift Protocol hack and recent capital outflows.
